params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, clear counters with single simple prop, visible sightline to dining bay, matte finishes, clear counters with one simple prop, visible pass-through or sightline to Dine, matte finishes (wood/stone). Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi-driven aesthetic balancing Scandinavian simplicity and Japanese restraint. The palette is warm neutrals with layered natural materials (oak, rattan, linen, stone) and soft, directional sunlight. Spaces are decluttered, low-profile, and arranged to support a young family: a modest crib in the bedroom and a compact standing desk integrated into the living corner for flexible work-from-home needs. Textures and lighting create a meditative, lived-in atmosphere rather than a staged showhome. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
